findings.description: The s4 hints include KANJI_NAME and KANA_NAME from the USERS table but omit other physical column names present in the source, including update-target columns UPDATED_USER_ID and UPDATED_DATE (which appear in the 更新処理仕様 table), as well as USER_ID, MAIL_ADDRESS, EXTENSION_NUMBER_BUILDING, EXTENSION_NUMBER_PERSONAL, MOBILE_PHONE_NUMBER_AREA_CODE, MOBILE_PHONE_NUMBER_CITY_CODE, MOBILE_PHONE_NUMBER_SBSCR_CODE, INSERT_USER_ID, and INSERT_DATE from the USERS table definition.
findings.source_evidence: Source 3)-1 USERS table lists 13 physical column names. Source 4) 更新処理仕様 lists UPDATED_USER_ID and UPDATED_DATE as update targets. Only KANJI_NAME and KANA_NAME appear in s4 hints.
